mapper.select: SELECT * FROM problem WHERE title = #{title} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM problem
AND COALESCE(status, 'PUBLISHED') = 'PUBLISHED'
AND difficulty = #{difficulty}
AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM problem_supported_language psl WHERE psl.problem_id = problem.id AND psl.status = 'ACTIVE' AND LOWER(psl.language_code) = LOWER(#{language}) ) OR ( NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM problem_supported_language legacy WHERE legacy.problem_id = problem.id ) AND LOWER(language) = LOWER(#{language}) ) )
AND FIND_IN_SET(#{knowledge}, knowledge_points) > 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO problem (title, content, input, output, difficulty, language, time_limit, memory_limit, tags, knowledge_points, hints, sample_explanation) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{input}, #{output}, #{difficulty}, #{language}, #{timeLimit}, #{memoryLimit}, #{tags}, #{knowledgePoints}, #{hints}, #{sampleExplanation})
mapper.update: UPDATE problem SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, input = #{input}, output = #{output}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, language = #{language}, time_limit = #{timeLimit}, memory_limit = #{memoryLimit}, tags = #{tags}, knowledge_points = #{knowledgePoints}, hints = #{hints}, sample_explanation = #{sampleExplanation}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE problem SET language = #{language}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM problem WHERE COALESCE(status, 'PUBLISHED') = 'PUBLISHED' AND FIND_IN_SET(#{tag}, tags) > 0 ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM problem WHERE COALESCE(status, 'PUBLISHED') = 'PUBLISHED' AND difficulty = #{difficulty} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM problem WHERE COALESCE(status, 'PUBLISHED') = 'PUBLISHED' AND FIND_IN_SET(#{knowledgePoint}, knowledge_points) > 0 ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM problem ORDER BY id DESC

SELECT language, COUNT(*) as problemCount FROM ( SELECT LOWER(psl.language_code) AS language, psl.problem_id FROM problem_supported_language psl INNER JOIN problem p ON p.id = psl.problem_id WHERE psl.status = 'ACTIVE' AND COALESCE(p.status, 'PUBLISHED') = 'PUBLISHED'
UNION ALL
SELECT LOWER(problem.language) AS language, problem.id AS problem_id FROM problem WHERE problem.language IS NOT NULL AND COALESCE(problem.status, 'PUBLISHED') = 'PUBLISHED' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM problem_supported_language legacy WHERE legacy.problem_id = problem.id ) ) language_union GROUP BY language ORDER BY problemCount DESC
